# DeepSeek API Usage Analytics Dashboard

> Visualize your DeepSeek API usage — drop your monthly ZIP exports or CSV files and get instant cost analytics, cache analysis, and per-key breakdowns. Open source (MIT), bilingual (EN/中文), and entirely browser-side. No account, no upload, no database.

## Features

- **Bilingual UI** — Full English and 简体中文 support across all pages and content. Auto-detects browser language on first visit, with a one-click toggle to switch anytime. All documentation (User Guide, Privacy Policy, Terms of Use, Changelog) is available in both languages.
- **Share Card Generation** — Generate professional 1200×630 social media infographic cards from any dashboard tab (Overview, Projects, Keys, Cache, Trends). Each card includes a KPI hero number, theme-aware mini-chart, QR code linking back to the app, and custom "From" signature. Copy to clipboard (paste directly into WeChat/Feishu/DingTalk) or download as PNG.
- **Open Source** — Fully open source under the MIT license. Codebase is public on GitHub with community infrastructure: CONTRIBUTING.md, CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md, issue templates, and pull request template. Anyone can audit, fork, or contribute.

## Docs

- [DeepSeek Usage Dashboard](https://deepseek-usage.xyz) — Main application: drag-and-drop CSV/ZIP analytics dashboard for DeepSeek API usage
- [DeepSeek API Cost Tracker](https://deepseek-usage.xyz/deepseek-api-cost-tracker) — SEO landing page: free, private DeepSeek API cost tracking tool
- [DeepSeek Cache Hit Rate Analyzer](https://deepseek-usage.xyz/deepseek-cache-hit-rate-analyzer) — SEO landing page: cache performance analysis and optimization guide
- [DeepSeek API Pricing Calculator](https://deepseek-usage.xyz/deepseek-api-pricing-calculator) — SEO landing page: interactive pricing calculator with competitor comparison
- [Blog](https://deepseek-usage.xyz/blog) — DeepSeek API cost optimization articles and developer guides
- [Blog: Context Caching Guide](https://deepseek-usage.xyz/blog/deepseek-context-caching-guide) — Deep dive into DeepSeek prefix-matching disk caching
- [Blog: Cost Optimization Tools](https://deepseek-usage.xyz/blog/deepseek-cost-optimization-tools) — Top 5 DeepSeek API cost optimization & observability tools compared
- [Blog: OpenAI vs DeepSeek](https://deepseek-usage.xyz/blog/openai-claude-vs-deepseek-cost-comparison) — Cost-benefit analysis: OpenAI GPT vs Claude vs DeepSeek V4 Pro
- [User Guide](https://deepseek-usage.xyz/guideline) — Bilingual step-by-step usage documentation with annotated screenshots
- [Changelog](https://deepseek-usage.xyz/changelog) — Complete version history from v0.1.0 to v0.6.3
- [Author](https://deepseek-usage.xyz/author) — Gavin Chen's profile page with bio, skills, and social links
- [Privacy Policy](https://deepseek-usage.xyz/privacy) — How your data is handled, bilingual legal text (7 sections)
- [Terms of Use](https://deepseek-usage.xyz/terms) — Legal terms and disclaimers, bilingual (8 sections)

## Optional

- [Complete Documentation (llms-full.txt)](https://deepseek-usage.xyz/llms-full.txt) — Full bilingual site content: How It Works, FAQ, About, Privacy Policy, Terms of Use, and complete version history (v0.1.0–v0.6.3)

## About

A free, privacy-first analytics tool for DeepSeek API users. Everything runs client-side in the browser — your CSV files are never uploaded to any server. Supports light/dark themes (auto-matched to system preference), ZIP auto-extraction, multi-month comparison, custom project grouping (drag-and-drop key assignment), model filtering, and social media share cards. Compatible with any static host (Vercel, Netlify, Cloudflare Pages, GitHub Pages). Tech stack: Next.js 16 (static export), React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, ECharts 6, Papa Parse, JSZip.
